mapper.insert: INSERT INTO internship_confirmation_record ( student_id, student_name, student_user_id, gender, grade, major, class_name, contact_phone, email, company_id, company_name, company_address, company_phone, position_id, position_name, internship_start_time, internship_end_time, internship_duration, remark, status, recall_status, recall_reason, recall_apply_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{studentName}, #{studentUserId}, #{gender}, #{grade}, #{major}, #{className}, #{contactPhone}, #{email}, #{companyId}, #{companyName}, #{companyAddress}, #{companyPhone}, #{positionId}, #{positionName}, #{internshipStartTime}, #{internshipEndTime}, #{internshipDuration}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{recallStatus}, #{recallReason}, #{recallApplyTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE internship_confirmation_record SET student_name = #{studentName}, student_user_id = #{studentUserId}, gender = #{gender}, grade = #{grade}, major = #{major}, class_name = #{className}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, email = #{email}, company_id = #{companyId}, company_name = #{companyName}, company_address = #{companyAddress}, company_phone = #{companyPhone}, position_id = #{positionId}, position_name = #{positionName}, internship_start_time = #{internshipStartTime}, internship_end_time = #{internshipEndTime}, internship_duration = #{internshipDuration}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status}, recall_status = #{recallStatus}, recall_reason = #{recallReason}, recall_apply_time = #{recallApplyTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM internship_confirmation_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM internship_confirmation_record WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM internship_confirmation_record WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM internship_confirmation_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
